# DropConnect

> Universal cross-device clipboard synchronization and instant file transfer platform. End-to-end encrypted with zero setup required.

## Core Pages
- [Home Page](https://dropconnect.up.railway.app/): Overview of DropConnect features, interactive onboarding demo, and quick navigation.
- [Desk Display Receiver](https://dropconnect.up.railway.app/receiver): Computer display mode generating real-time QR codes and listening for incoming clipboard data.
- [Mobile Sender](https://dropconnect.up.railway.app/sender): Mobile scanner interface for scanning QR codes and sending clipboard snippets or files to desktop displays.
- [Authentication & Account](https://dropconnect.up.railway.app/login): Sign up or log in via Google OAuth or Email/Password.
- [Premium Dashboard](https://dropconnect.up.railway.app/premium): Manage custom persistent room spaces and encrypted clip history.
- [Account Settings](https://dropconnect.up.railway.app/settings): Manage user profile, phone number, and security credentials.
- [Anonymous Feedback](https://dropconnect.up.railway.app/feedback): Submit anonymous feature requests or community reviews.

## Documentation & Legal
- [Privacy Policy](https://dropconnect.up.railway.app/privacy): Information regarding AES encryption, data privacy, and third-party processing.
- [Terms & Conditions](https://dropconnect.up.railway.app/terms): Terms of service, acceptable use policies, and legal agreements.
- [Cancellation & Refund Policy](https://dropconnect.up.railway.app/refund): Billing policies and refund terms.
